meta.synopsis: Genly Ai, the envoy from the Ekumen, attends a ceremonial parade in the capital city of Erhenrang on the planet Gethen. He observes the political dynamics between King Argaven, Estraven, and Tibe, and later has a tense and revealing conversation with Estraven about loyalty, patriotism, and the challenges of his mission.
